[@microsoft/fast-element](../fast-element/index.html) &gt; [ElementController](../fast-element.elementcontroller/index.html) &gt; [isHydrated](../fast-element.elementcontroller.ishydrated/index.html)

## ElementController.isHydrated property

Resolves `true` after prerendered content has been successfully hydrated, or `false` when the component is client-side rendered or hydration is not enabled.

**Signature:**

```typescript
readonly isHydrated: Promise<boolean>;
```
